mechanics.excerpt: Clan Characters: Trueborn characters must begin Stage Clan Creche; Freeborn characters start the Life Path based on their caste scientist and merchant caste characters start on the White Collar Path_ technician caste on Blue Collar, laborer caste on Blue Collar Farm (player' s choice), and dark caste on the Back Woods, Farm; Street or Blue Collar paths_ If you want your character t0 be freeborn warrior, he or she must pegin the Life Path in one of the civilian castes Free Skills: Regardless of Life Path; all player characters automatically receive Skill Points to be divided as the play ers choose among their affiliation' primary and secondary Language Skills_ Characters also receive 3 Skill Points toward Language /English (all Skill Points can go to the Language /English Skill, if the player desires).
